summary: TemaDom Iteration 23 - Price increases +15% and video instructions. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. EUR pricing verified: Starter 20, Pro 40, Premium 79. Pro plan correctly shows 'Без AI Designer' in limitations (AI Designer REMOVED from Pro). Premium includes AI Designer up to 5 variants. Standalone services: PDF contract 6 EUR, AI blueprint 17 EUR. AI Designer 12 EUR/gen with bundles 29/45 EUR. Video 'Инструкции' button works on both AI Designer and AI Sketch pages, opening interactive tutorial modal with 4 steps and 'Разбрах, да започнем!' close button.
passed_tests: ✅ Pro plan has 'Без AI Designer' limitation
✅ Pro plan features do NOT include AI Designer
✅ Premium includes AI Designer up to 5 variants
✅ Homepage standalone prices: 6 EUR PDF, 17 EUR AI blueprint
✅ Subscriptions page shows 3 plans with correct EUR pricing
✅ Pro plan shows 'Без AI Designer' and 'Без AI Sketch анализ' limitations
✅ Premium shows 'AI Designer: до 5 варианта визуализация' feature
✅ 'Еднократни услуги' section visible with 6 EUR / 17 EUR
✅ AI Designer module: 12 EUR/gen, bundles 29/45 EUR
✅ AI Designer page: 'Инструкции' button visible and working
✅ AI Designer: Tutorial modal opens with 4 steps
✅ AI Designer: 'Разбрах, да започнем!' close button works
✅ AI Sketch page: Upload zones (1-3 files) present
✅ AI Sketch page: Building types (residential/commercial/industrial/renovation/other) present
✅ AI Sketch page: 'Инструкции' button visible and working
✅ AI Sketch: Tutorial modal opens correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features verified and working correctly:
1. EUR prices increased +15%: Starter 20 EUR (was 17), Pro 40 EUR (was 35), Premium 79 EUR (was 69)
2. AI Designer REMOVED from Pro plan - Pro now shows 'Без AI Designer' and 'Без AI Sketch анализ' in limitations
3. Premium still includes AI Designer with up to 5 variants
4. Standalone services updated: PDF contract 6 EUR (was 5), AI blueprint 17 EUR (was 15)
5. AI Designer standalone: 12 EUR/gen (was 10), bundles 29/45 EUR (was 25/39)
6. Video 'Инструкции' button works on AI Designer page with interactive 4-step tutorial modal
7. AI Sketch page has videoUrl prop added - 'Инструкции' button visible with AI Sketch tutorial
8. All tutorial modals have 'Разбрах, да започнем!' close button
context_for_next_testing_agent: TemaDom Iteration 23 fully tested. Major updates verified: 1) EUR prices increased +15%: Starter 20 EUR, Pro 40 EUR, Premium 79 EUR, 2) AI Designer REMOVED from Pro plan (now shows 'Без AI Designer' limitation), 3) Premium includes AI Designer up to 5 variants, 4) Standalone services: PDF 6 EUR, AI blueprint 17 EUR, 5) AI Designer 12 EUR/gen with bundles 29/45 EUR, 6) Video 'Инструкции' button on AI Designer and AI Sketch pages opens interactive tutorial modal with 4 steps, 7) All modals have 'Разбрах, да започнем!' close button. All pages load correctly with proper Bulgarian language.
